skill: Nonlinear equations in one variable and systems of equations in two variables
stem: 3|7 − x| + 4|7 − x| = 49. What is the positive solution to the given equation?
rationale: Combine like terms: 7|7 − x| = 49, so |7 − x| = 7. By the definition of absolute value, 7 − x = 7 or 7 − x = −7. The first gives x = 0; the second gives x = 14. The positive solution greater than zero is x = 14.
